tickets.title: Implement run orchestrator and pipeline stage framework
acceptance_criteria: Supports run types: ingestion, daily_brief, alert_scan, alert_dispatch, maintenance
Persists run lifecycle fields in runs table
Enforces bounded retries and no uncontrolled loops

tickets.title: Implement ingestion, extraction, normalization, and dedup stages
acceptance_criteria: Respects per-source and global document caps
Handles metadata_only paywall policy without fabricated full text
Writes normalized records compatible with data_model.md

tickets.title: Implement chunking and FTS indexing pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Chunks are persisted with stable chunk_index ordering
FTS table is populated and queryable for keyword retrieval
Index write failure hard-fails the run

tickets.title: Implement citation validator and abstain fallback
acceptance_criteria: Every output bullet/claim has at least one citation
Paywall citations never include fabricated quote text
On validation failure, system removes invalid claims or outputs explicit insufficient evidence

tickets.title: Implement runtime budget guard
acceptance_criteria: Enforces monthly=100, daily=3, hourly=0.10 USD caps
Stops run before new model/tool call if cap exceeded
Persists budget windows and exceed flags in budget_ledger

tickets.title: Implement alert scoring and policy gates
acceptance_criteria: Computes weighted score from alert_scoring.md
Applies quality gates, cooldown, and max alerts/day
Stores suppression reason for non-delivered alerts

tickets.title: Implement daily brief delivery
acceptance_criteria: Daily brief can be scheduled in the user timezone
Daily brief delivers local HTML plus optional email
Daily brief runtime produces validated or explicit abstained output
Daily brief delivery failures are logged and retry-eligible next run

tickets.title: Add eval harness and 10 golden cases
acceptance_criteria: At least 10 golden cases exist and run locally
Eval suite checks citation validity and abstain behavior
Eval suite checks budget stop behavior

tickets.title: Implement manual portfolio relevance mapping
acceptance_criteria: Users can input and update ticker + weight locally through the runtime portfolio store
Daily-brief runtime outputs deterministic relevance flags and risk categories without buy/sell guidance
Portfolio positions and relevance flags are persisted locally and covered by tests

tickets.title: Implement alert delivery after the daily-brief path is stable
acceptance_criteria: Alert output follows 3-6 bullet format with citations
Alert delivery semantics, cooldown suppression, and daily-cap suppression are explicit in the runtime result
Alert delivery failures are logged and retry-eligible next run
